description: Healing benchmark: known broken test files with synthetic error logs and expected repair checks. Maps to tests/fixtures/*.spec.ts.

cases.description: Selector drift — ID selector drifted, locator resolves to 0 elements
cases.error_log:
Error: locator('#submit-btn') could not be found on the page.
locator resolved to 0 elements

cases.description: Timeout too short — 5000ms on a slow page needing 30000ms
cases.error_log:
TimeoutError: page.goto: Timeout 5000ms exceeded.
Call log:
  - navigating to 'https://example.com/slow', waiting until 'load'

cases.description: Missing import — expect not imported from @playwright/test
cases.error_log:
ReferenceError: expect is not defined
    at Object.<anonymous> (broken_import.spec.ts:6:3)
    at Module._compile (node:internal/modules/cjs/loader:1356:14)

cases.description: Wrong assertion — toBe used where toHaveText is required for a locator
cases.error_log:
Error: expect(received).toBe(expected)
Expected: 'Example Domain'
Received: Locator
  + expected - actual
  -[Locator]
  +'Example Domain'
